title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0136 357 Filton Avenue, Horfield, Bristol, BS7 0BD
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Mr & Mrs Harpreet and Harrminder Sehmbi and Kaur Sehmbi  Site address:  357 Filton Avenue, Horfield, Bristol, BS7 0BD  Description of proposed development:  Erection of a first floor side extension to existing first floor flat. Partial demolition of rear extensions, to facilitate the change of use of part of the ground floor to a takeaway (sui generis), and part of the ground and first floors to a small HMO (C4 Use Class), including a new extract flue for takeaway (resubmission of planning application 24/03459/F).  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 19 November 2025   Date by when representations must be made 30 December 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 14 January 2026   Decision date 8 January 2026     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 175 KB, 10 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 30 December 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0136 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     579-PLA-112D PROPOSED ROOF PLAN  (PDF, 1.59 MB, 1 page)  579-PLA-120B PROPOSED WEST AND EAST ELEVATIONS  (PDF, 647 KB, 1 page)  579-PLA-121B PROPOSED NORTH ELEVATION  (PDF, 507 KB, 1 page)  579-PLA-122B PROPOSED SOUTH ELEVATION  (PDF, 545 KB, 1 page)  579-PLA-123C PROPOSED SECTIONS  (PDF, 719 KB, 1 page)  251022 Cover letter PR002335 FINAL  (PDF, 748 KB, 13 pages)  APPLICATION FORM  (PDF, 446 KB, 15 pages)  BNG exemption form  (PDF, 929 KB, 4 pages)  Energy Strategy - 357...
